meta.title: Domenico Foglia · Full Stack Developer
meta.description: Portfolio of Domenico Foglia, Full Stack Developer with Laravel, React, and TypeScript.

brand.tagline: Hi, I'm <1>Domenico</1>. I'm a web developer based in Catanzaro, Italy, and I build applications with <2>Laravel and React</2>. Scroll down to see what I've made.

about.p1: I'm a <1>Full Stack Developer</1> with a university background in computer science and an intensive bootcamp with Aulab. I don't just build simple web pages: I like to build complete applications, taking care of every detail.
about.p2: I work across the whole stack: React and TypeScript on the frontend, PHP and Laravel on the backend, and MySQL for the database.
about.p3: In my projects I handle the entire lifecycle: from database schema design to deploying on a VPS, with Nginx and HTTPS configured and demo data ready to use.
about.p4: I'm looking for a team of experienced people to work with, where I can contribute from day one and keep building things that actually work.

aulab.title: Full Stack Developer Course
aulab.description: Intensive training on HTML, CSS, JavaScript, PHP, Laravel, SQL, and React. Building complete applications in an Agile/Scrum environment.

unical.title: Bachelor's in Computer Science
unical.description: Object-oriented programming, algorithms, databases, discrete mathematics, systems architecture. Solid foundations everything else was built on.

mirivo.description: Multi-tenant helpdesk system with tickets, escalation, internal chat, and FAQ generation from closed tickets via Google Gemini. Demo login card for immediate access, no registration required.

carrermode.description: Web app to manage job applications. AI analysis of job offer vs CV, cover letter generation, 10 visual themes, bilingual IT/EN.

sedh.description: Showcase portfolio for a local artist. Vanilla HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, responsive, careful attention to design and user experience.

ricettai.description: React web app that generates recipes with Google Gemini 2.5 Flash Lite.

giftchaos.description: Full stack application to manage Secret Santa events. Draw algorithm with constraint handling between participants, authentication, full CRUD, and email notifications.

contatti.title: Let's talk.
contatti.p1: I'm looking for a role as a <1>Full Stack Developer</1> or <2>Backend / Frontend Developer</2>. Available on-site, hybrid, or remote. Open to relocation anywhere in Italy.
contatti.p2: The best way to reach me is via email or LinkedIn, I respond within 24 hours.
